```python
def find_kth_smallest(list1, list2, k):
    i, j = 0, 0
    while True:
        if i == len(list1):
            return list2[j + k - 1]
        if j == len(list2):
            return list1[i + k - 1]
        if k == 1:

        new_i = min(i + mid_k, len(list1)) - 1
        new_j = min(j + mid_k, len(list2)) - 1

            k -= (new_i - i + 1)
            i = new_i + 1
        else:
            k -= (new_j - j + 1)
            j = new_j + 1
```
